name: goodai-mate — Outbound Voice (site -> n8n -> Trillet, agent-by-name)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.to, call_agent_id: $json.call_agent_id, callback_url: $env.N8N_CALL_STATUS_URL, dynamic_variables: { agentName: $json.agentName }, metadata: { source: $json.source, event: $json.event, requested_at: $json.timestamp, agent_name: $json.agent_name, raw_phone: $json.raw_phone } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, success: true, agent: $json.agent_name, callId: $json.callId, jobId: $json.jobId }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, success: false, error: 'Invalid or missing phone number', received: $json.raw_phone }) }}
